summary: Introduces update checks, improved configuration handling, and upgrades the CLI to Go 1.26.1 with modernized dependencies.
highlights: New `reserve update check` command for lightweight version checks
Per-user config file locations on macOS, Linux, and Windows
Local `./config.json` overrides user config for development workflows
Upgraded to Go 1.26.1 for improved performance and tooling
Dependency updates including Cobra and terminal formatting libraries
update_instructions: Download the latest release from the GitHub releases page or rerun the install script from download.reservecli.dev.
